title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes experience that deploys production-grade clusters with a single click. It combines managed control plane and data plane operations while maintaining customization options through tools like Karpenter for auto-scaling and supports both AI training and inference workloads at scale.
